name: helixgen
description: Single-plugin marketplace for helixgen — natural-language → Line 6 Helix Stadium preset generation

plugins.name: helixgen
plugins.description: Generate Line 6 Helix Stadium presets from natural-language tone requests, and control a Stadium directly over your LAN — no editor app. Provides the /tone, /setup, and /device skills plus an MCP server for preset authoring and editing, impulse-response management, and full device control (preset CRUD, backup/restore, and installing or bulk-syncing authored tones onto the hardware). The bundled code runs via `uv`, which auto-provisions its Python dependencies — requires `uv` on your PATH.
